summary: DaruBahi MVP tested end-to-end. Backend: 18/18 pytest cases passed (auth OTP dev bypass, /auth/me, unauth 401, categories presets + custom, product CRUD + soft delete, sale with stock decrement + profit + over-stock rejection, stock-entry closing computation + negative closing rejection, dashboard, daily & monthly reports). Frontend E2E via mobile viewport (390x844) on the public Expo preview: login with 9999999999 -> OTP autofilled to 123456 -> Verify -> Dashboard renders with quick actions; Catalog tab shows chips + product list; Reports Daily/Monthly toggle renders monthly figures (Sales, Profit, Remaining Stock, Top 5, Category-wise); Sell, Daily Entry, Add Product screens all mount with correct testIDs; More -> Logout returns to /login. No deprecated Expo packages, no red screen. Console shows only benign warnings (shadow*/pointerEvents deprecation, useNativeDriver fallback on web).

issues: React Native web warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow) and 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated (use style.pointerEvents). Cosmetic only, but worth cleaning up in theme.ts / component styles.

action_items: Optional: migrate shadow* style props to boxShadow and pointerEvents to style.pointerEvents to silence RN web deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is single-file ~580 lines; acceptable for MVP but consider splitting auth/products/sales/reports into routers if it grows further.
get_phone_from_token is used directly by /auth/setup-shop (bypasses current_user which requires shop) — correct pattern, well handled.
MongoDB _id is properly excluded via projection {'_id': 0} and clean() helper. Good.
JWT_SECRET falls back to 'dev-secret' — fine for MVP but should be enforced in prod deployment.
seed_data_creation: Test QA shop (TEST_QA_Shop / TEST_QA_Owner) auto-created for +919999999999 via setup-shop fixture. TEST_Brand_* and TEST_CAT_* rows may remain in DB for the QA user — harmless and prefixed for cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: QA login: 9999999999 / 123456. Shop is already set up for this number after this run, so verify-otp returns is_new_user=false and the app routes straight to /(tabs). To exercise the setup screen again, delete the user from the users collection for phone +919999999999. Backend base is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL + /api. Pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_darubahi_api.py can be reused as regression suite.
